title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: libwacom bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for libwacom is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The libwacom packages contain a library that provides access to a tablet model database. The libwacom packages expose the contents of this database to applications, allowing for tablet-specific user interfaces. The libwacom packages allow the GNOME tools to automatically configure screen mappings and calibrations, and provide device-specific configurations.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [libwacom] Backport Wacom Intuos Pro 3rd Gen to RHEL10 [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-101873)

full_text:
An update for libwacom is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The libwacom packages contain a library that provides access to a tablet model database. The libwacom packages expose the contents of this database to applications, allowing for tablet-specific user interfaces. The libwacom packages allow the GNOME tools to automatically configure screen mappings and calibrations, and provide device-specific configurations.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [libwacom] Backport Wacom Intuos Pro 3rd Gen to RHEL10 [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-101873)
